title: Case Converter
seoDescription: Free online text case converter. Convert text to uppercase, lowercase, title case, sentence case, and more. Quick and easy text formatting tool.
howToUseTitle: How to Use the Case Converter
step1Desc: Type or paste your text into the input field.
step2Desc: Choose from UPPERCASE, lowercase, Title Case, Sentence case, camelCase, or PascalCase.
step3Desc: Click any case button and the result appears instantly. Use Copy to save.
faq1A: UPPERCASE, lowercase, Title Case, Sentence case, camelCase, and PascalCase.
faq2Q: Does it work with special characters?
faq2A: Yes, numbers and special characters are preserved during conversion.
faq3A: No hard limit, but very large texts may be slower to process.
